activities_projects.title: Simple Electric Circuit
steps: Connect the battery, bulb, and switch using wires
Close the switch to complete the circuit
Observe the bulb glowing
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how a closed circuit allows current to flow

activities_projects.title: Heating Effect of Electric Current
activities_projects.objective: Observe how electric current produces heat
steps: Connect the nichrome wire in a circuit with a battery
Close the switch
Observe the wire getting warm

activities_projects.title: Electromagnet Experiment
steps: Wrap copper wire around the iron nail
Connect the wire ends to the battery
Bring the nail near paper clips and observe attraction

activities_projects.title: Testing Conductors and Insulators
steps: Make a simple circuit with a gap
Place different materials in the gap
Observe if the bulb glows

activities_projects.title: Electricity Safety Poster
steps: Draw a poster showing safe electrical practices
Include do's and don'ts
Present the poster to the class

activities_projects.title: Switch On–Switch Off Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of a switch in a circuit
steps: Create a circuit with a switch
Turn the switch on and off
Observe how the bulb responds

activities_projects.title: Electromagnet Strength Test
steps: Wrap the wire around the nail with few turns
Connect to battery and count paper clips lifted
Increase number of turns and repeat
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how coil turns affect magnetic strength

activities_projects.title: Simple Electric Bell Model
activities_projects.objective: Understand the use of electromagnets in devices
steps: Create an electromagnet using nail and wire
Arrange the metal strip so it touches and breaks the circuit
Observe repeated tapping movement

activities_projects.title: Identify Electric Appliances
activities_projects.objective: Recognize devices that use heating effect
steps: List appliances like iron, heater, kettle
Write how electricity produces heat in them
Explain their use

activities_projects.title: Circuit Drawing Practice
activities_projects.objective: Learn to represent circuits using symbols
steps: Draw symbols for battery, bulb, switch, and wire
Create a circuit diagram
Label all components
